channel.title: TikTok Shop Dev Updates
channel.description: Official updates for TikTok Shop developer docs

item.title: US market: Mandatory compliance attributes added for Paper Money and Coins Categories
item.description: # Summary ### What are we launching In the event that non-circulating currencies are sold as commodities, to ensure full regulatory compliance, we will introduce new mandatory attributes to the Get Attributes API. Sellers are required to fully complete all such attributes as a precondition for listing products in the affected product categories. ### When are we launching it API enforcement for product listings (**Create and Edit Product APIs**) with these compliance attributes will begin after *...
item.content:encoded: # Summary ### What are we launching In the event that non-circulating currencies are sold as commodities, to ensure full regulatory compliance, we will introduce new mandatory attributes to the Get Attributes API. Sellers are required to fully complete all such attributes as a precondition for listing products in the affected product categories. ### When are we launching it API enforcement for product listings (**Create and Edit Product APIs**) with these compliance attributes will begin after *...

item.title: US market: Updates to mandatory attributes
item.description: ## Summary To meet compliance requirements, TikTok Shop is making compliance-related attributes mandatory across various product categories. Starting from **2026-04-06**, the Products API will require these compliance-related attributes to be provided. ## Impact | Impacted market(s) | United States (US) | | --- | --- | | Impacted version(s) | 202309 (and later) | ## Changes The following attributes in the specified categories will become mandatory. | **Compliance scenario** | **Attributes affect...
item.content:encoded: ## Summary To meet compliance requirements, TikTok Shop is making compliance-related attributes mandatory across various product categories. Starting from **2026-04-06**, the Products API will require these compliance-related attributes to be provided. ## Impact | Impacted market(s) | United States (US) | | --- | --- | | Impacted version(s) | 202309 (and later) | ## Changes The following attributes in the specified categories will become mandatory. | **Compliance scenario** | **Attributes affect...

item.title: For all EU markets (EU5) Get Shipping Providers API
item.description: # What is changing? Starting **March 26, 2026**, the **Get Shipping Providers API** has been enhanced to support accurate **EU shipping provider resolution**. Due to interconnected logistics services within the EU, a single delivery option can correspond to **multiple cross-border shipping routes**. To return the correct shipping provider for a specific route, ISVs are now required to specify both: * the **shipping origin country** (warehouse), and * the **destination country** (buyer). Two new ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting **March 26, 2026**, the **Get Shipping Providers API** has been enhanced to support accurate **EU shipping provider resolution**. Due to interconnected logistics services within the EU, a single delivery option can correspond to **multiple cross-border shipping routes**. To return the correct shipping provider for a specific route, ISVs are now required to specify both: * the **shipping origin country** (warehouse), and * the **destination country** (buyer). Two new ...

item.title: Analytics Open API Metric Consistency Adjustment Announcement
item.description: ### 1. Overview & Background To provide developers and merchants with a more consistent and accurate data experience, we will soon be adjusting the metric attribution for select Analytics Open APIs. This upgrade is designed to harmonize data definitions across different analytics products and help our partners more accurately measure business performance. ### 2. Summary of Changes To ensure a smooth transition, we will be introducing a **new API version** while making backward-compatible adjustm...
item.content:encoded: ### 1. Overview & Background To provide developers and merchants with a more consistent and accurate data experience, we will soon be adjusting the metric attribution for select Analytics Open APIs. This upgrade is designed to harmonize data definitions across different analytics products and help our partners more accurately measure business performance. ### 2. Summary of Changes To ensure a smooth transition, we will be introducing a **new API version** while making backward-compatible adjustm...

item.title: EU Markets: Category Rules Update – Responsible Person Attribute Now Mandatory
item.description: # What is changing? Starting **February 28, 2026**, the **Responsible Person (RP)** attribute will change from **optional to mandatory** in **selected existing product categories** where it was previously optional. Sellers must update existing listings to include the Responsible Person attribute by **March 28, 2026**. Listings that are not updated by this date may be **deactivated by the platform**. Updated API Endpoint(s): * [Get Category Rules ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-ca...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting **February 28, 2026**, the **Responsible Person (RP)** attribute will change from **optional to mandatory** in **selected existing product categories** where it was previously optional. Sellers must update existing listings to include the Responsible Person attribute by **March 28, 2026**. Listings that are not updated by this date may be **deactivated by the platform**. Updated API Endpoint(s): * [Get Category Rules ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-ca...

item.title: For SEA Market: Recommended Improvement to Support Fast Delivery Service
item.description: # What is changing? When sellers choose **++Instant or Sameday shipping option++** to facilitate faster delivery to customers, TikTok Shop will aggressively evaluate the shipping and collection time of the orders to provide a satisfactory user experience. In Seller Center, there are several functions to support sellers for better managing these fast delivery orders. We recommend adopting the following changes 1. Allow sellers to print shipping labels before schedule shipping 2. Understand new SL...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? When sellers choose **++Instant or Sameday shipping option++** to facilitate faster delivery to customers, TikTok Shop will aggressively evaluate the shipping and collection time of the orders to provide a satisfactory user experience. In Seller Center, there are several functions to support sellers for better managing these fast delivery orders. We recommend adopting the following changes 1. Allow sellers to print shipping labels before schedule shipping 2. Understand new SL...

item.title: [Important] New Analytics API Supports Data Drill Down & Deprecation of Old Versions
item.description: # Summary The existing **Analytics APIs** have a **new** version for `202509`, with the primary objective of aligning the data caliber with Seller Center Data Compass. Additionally, 3 new APIs have been added to provide data granularity to help merchants and influencers review, consolidate, and iterate content (video + live) production processes. Details of the new API endpoints and functions are listed below. --- # Impact | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | --- | -...
item.content:encoded: # Summary The existing **Analytics APIs** have a **new** version for `202509`, with the primary objective of aligning the data caliber with Seller Center Data Compass. Additionally, 3 new APIs have been added to provide data granularity to help merchants and influencers review, consolidate, and iterate content (video + live) production processes. Details of the new API endpoints and functions are listed below. --- # Impact | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | --- | -...

item.title: 【Important Notice】Enable Support for the New “On Hold” Order Status
item.description: # **Mandatory Activation for All Apps in All Global Markets, Q1 2026** To enhance buyer experience and improve overall order processing stability, TikTok Shop introduced a new order status — **“On Hold”** — effective **December 13, 2023**. To ensure ecosystem-wide consistency, **TikTok Shop will automatically activate “On Hold” orders for all apps that have not yet enabled support starting in Q1 2026**. This means: **All apps that have not completed integration will begin receiving On Hold order...
item.content:encoded: # **Mandatory Activation for All Apps in All Global Markets, Q1 2026** To enhance buyer experience and improve overall order processing stability, TikTok Shop introduced a new order status — **“On Hold”** — effective **December 13, 2023**. To ensure ecosystem-wide consistency, **TikTok Shop will automatically activate “On Hold” orders for all apps that have not yet enabled support starting in Q1 2026**. This means: **All apps that have not completed integration will begin receiving On Hold order...

item.title: For Indonesian market: Changes in Order and Finance APIs for Horizon+ Orders
item.description: The orders with tag "Horizon+" will hide shipping fees at sku prices, so the sku prices will be increased and the shipping fee will be reduced. There are changes in order and finance APIs for this type of order which are estimated to be effective on January 22, 2026. By using these API, the sellers can get the original sku prices and shipping fees. These original sku prices and shipping fees can also be checked at the seller center. Here is the list of changes: 1. [Get Order Detail](https://part...
item.content:encoded: The orders with tag "Horizon+" will hide shipping fees at sku prices, so the sku prices will be increased and the shipping fee will be reduced. There are changes in order and finance APIs for this type of order which are estimated to be effective on January 22, 2026. By using these API, the sellers can get the original sku prices and shipping fees. These original sku prices and shipping fees can also be checked at the seller center. Here is the list of changes: 1. [Get Order Detail](https://part...

item.title: New Capability for Affiliate Sample Applications
item.description: # Overview This release introduces several new affiliate sample-related capabilities to improve the compliance and automation of the sample application workflow. Additionally, the platform now supports sub-account authorization for affiliate-category apps, allowing merchants to grant permissions to eligible sub-accounts for increased operational flexibility. ## What’s New * **New API:**[ Seller Get Sample Request Deeplink ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/seller-get-sample-request-deep...
item.content:encoded: # Overview This release introduces several new affiliate sample-related capabilities to improve the compliance and automation of the sample application workflow. Additionally, the platform now supports sub-account authorization for affiliate-category apps, allowing merchants to grant permissions to eligible sub-accounts for increased operational flexibility. ## What’s New * **New API:**[ Seller Get Sample Request Deeplink ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/seller-get-sample-request-deep...

item.title: For SEA market: The parameter "handover_method" in API Ship Package and Batch Ship Package will be useless for cross-border overseas sellers
item.description: # What is changing? From June 17, 2024, Platform updated the collection method to support sellers to choose different collection methods for different warehouse content. The parameter "handover_method" in API [Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1?external_id=650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1#Back%20To%20Top) and [Batch Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4?external_id=650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4#Back%20To%20Top) will be u...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? From June 17, 2024, Platform updated the collection method to support sellers to choose different collection methods for different warehouse content. The parameter "handover_method" in API [Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1?external_id=650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1#Back%20To%20Top) and [Batch Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4?external_id=650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4#Back%20To%20Top) will be u...

item.title: For SEA market: Product category expansion cutoff date is January 12, 2026
item.description: # What is changing? On August 21, 2025, we introduced the product category expansion in SEA market. Please check this link: https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/npb6fvbh Now we announce that the cutoff date for this product category expansion is January 12, 2026. After this date, use **`category_version=V2`** parameter for all category trees when listing new products or editing products. This applies to the following Product APIs: – [POST Create Product](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? On August 21, 2025, we introduced the product category expansion in SEA market. Please check this link: https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/npb6fvbh Now we announce that the cutoff date for this product category expansion is January 12, 2026. After this date, use **`category_version=V2`** parameter for all category trees when listing new products or editing products. This applies to the following Product APIs: – [POST Create Product](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2...

item.title: [Important] Legacy Global Product Management Flow Decommission Notice
item.description: ## Summary The platform has introduced a **new product management workflow** (see *“https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/a5crrkzs”* for details). All cross-border merchants are now supported and can use this new workflow to complete product management–related operations. To reduce overall maintenance costs for both developers and the platform, and to unify product management capabilities, the platform will deprecate the legacy global product management flow. ## **Changes** * Starting **Janu...
item.content:encoded: ## Summary The platform has introduced a **new product management workflow** (see *“https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/a5crrkzs”* for details). All cross-border merchants are now supported and can use this new workflow to complete product management–related operations. To reduce overall maintenance costs for both developers and the platform, and to unify product management capabilities, the platform will deprecate the legacy global product management flow. ## **Changes** * Starting **Janu...

item.title: US market: Backorder Quantity Thresholds
item.description: ## Summary We've introduced inventory `backorder_quantity` functionality, which allows sellers to define a backorder quantity **threshold** to continue to capture sales, in the event the physical inventory is temporarily out-of-stock. There also needs to be a `handling_time` defined, which dictates how many days the seller needs to process the backorder and sets the SLA for sending a fulfillment event update to TikTok Shop. [Backorder(BO) Seller Academy article](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/univ...
item.content:encoded: ## Summary We've introduced inventory `backorder_quantity` functionality, which allows sellers to define a backorder quantity **threshold** to continue to capture sales, in the event the physical inventory is temporarily out-of-stock. There also needs to be a `handling_time` defined, which dictates how many days the seller needs to process the backorder and sets the SLA for sending a fulfillment event update to TikTok Shop. [Backorder(BO) Seller Academy article](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/univ...

item.title: US market: Existing SKU standardization
item.description: # Summary Currently, there are some data inconsistencies as a result of custom SKU properties. We'd like to address this by introducing a way to standardize new SKU property values, as well as migrate existing custom ones. These custom attributes—previously used when creating products—will be processed through an algorithm, and the system will replace eligible custom attributes with the platform’s standardized attributes. As a result, both the attribute ID and attribute name will change. # Impac...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Currently, there are some data inconsistencies as a result of custom SKU properties. We'd like to address this by introducing a way to standardize new SKU property values, as well as migrate existing custom ones. These custom attributes—previously used when creating products—will be processed through an algorithm, and the system will replace eligible custom attributes with the platform’s standardized attributes. As a result, both the attribute ID and attribute name will change. # Impac...

item.title: US market: POP USPS label restriction
item.description: # Summary Beginning **October 27th, 2025**, 3PL USPS labels will be restricted under our new shipping policy for POP sellers. If sellers want to use USPS labels, they will have to purchase them through TikTok Shipping, which will require all apps used by POP sellers to integrate with TikTok Shipping. | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * United States (US) - Cross-border and ACCU | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? US cross-border merchants and ACCU merchants wi...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Beginning **October 27th, 2025**, 3PL USPS labels will be restricted under our new shipping policy for POP sellers. If sellers want to use USPS labels, they will have to purchase them through TikTok Shipping, which will require all apps used by POP sellers to integrate with TikTok Shipping. | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * United States (US) - Cross-border and ACCU | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? US cross-border merchants and ACCU merchants wi...

item.title: For SEA market: Configure "Cancellation status change" webhook to receive cancellation message
item.description: Since TikTok Shop is proposing to allow buyers to cancel eligible orders between the status Ready To Ship (RTS) and Transit To Ship (TTS), please configure the "[Cancellation status change](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/11-cancellation-status-change)" webhook to receive cancellation messages. If sellers receive such a cancellation message, they need to takeout the parcel and do not ship it. This webhook's related links are as below: * "Cancellation status change" webhook: https://par...
item.content:encoded: Since TikTok Shop is proposing to allow buyers to cancel eligible orders between the status Ready To Ship (RTS) and Transit To Ship (TTS), please configure the "[Cancellation status change](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/11-cancellation-status-change)" webhook to receive cancellation messages. If sellers receive such a cancellation message, they need to takeout the parcel and do not ship it. This webhook's related links are as below: * "Cancellation status change" webhook: https://par...

item.title: UKEU & JP markets: Product category expansion
item.description: # Summary Recently in the SEA market, following last year's rollout in the US market, TikTok Shop introduced an increase to the levels in the category tree, from **three** to at-most **seven**, with the aim of improving product information quality. Beginning this week, we will be introducing this product category expansion in the **UK**, **EU**, and **JP** markets. This changelog will provide a quick overview of API changes you may need to implement. **For a more detailed walkthrough on how to i...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Recently in the SEA market, following last year's rollout in the US market, TikTok Shop introduced an increase to the levels in the category tree, from **three** to at-most **seven**, with the aim of improving product information quality. Beginning this week, we will be introducing this product category expansion in the **UK**, **EU**, and **JP** markets. This changelog will provide a quick overview of API changes you may need to implement. **For a more detailed walkthrough on how to i...

item.title: EU market: Pfand Fees and Packaging Type Data
item.description: # Summary A Pfand is a refundable deposit applied to certain products, typically beverage containers (e.g., bottles or cans), in countries with a deposit return system like Germany. The customer pays the deposit when purchasing the product and can reclaim it by returning the empty container to a designated return point. This system incentivizes recycling and proper disposal of packaging. Packaging type refers to the specific kind of container material and reusability (e.g., single-use vs. multi-...
item.content:encoded: # Summary A Pfand is a refundable deposit applied to certain products, typically beverage containers (e.g., bottles or cans), in countries with a deposit return system like Germany. The customer pays the deposit when purchasing the product and can reclaim it by returning the empty container to a designated return point. This system incentivizes recycling and proper disposal of packaging. Packaging type refers to the specific kind of container material and reusability (e.g., single-use vs. multi-...

item.title: US market: Item protection/insurance
item.description: # Summary We've updated our Order APIs to support the rollout of item protection for TikTok Shop orders. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * United States (US) - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? Since TikTok Shop buyers can now purchase item protection for their order(s), we wanted to ensure our APIs reflected that as well. ## POST Get Order List and GET Order Detail For both [POST Get Order List](https://partner.tiktokshop.c...
item.content:encoded: # Summary We've updated our Order APIs to support the rollout of item protection for TikTok Shop orders. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * United States (US) - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? Since TikTok Shop buyers can now purchase item protection for their order(s), we wanted to ensure our APIs reflected that as well. ## POST Get Order List and GET Order Detail For both [POST Get Order List](https://partner.tiktokshop.c...

item.title: Analytics APIs now available globally
item.description: # Summary Today, we've opened up all our analytics APIs to be available globally! Endpoints that were previously exclusive to the US, UK, and SEA can now be used to return performance metrics for any shop, regardless of market. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202405 (and later) | # What's new? All existing Analytics APIs are now available in all markets. These include: – [GET Shop Performance](https://partner....
item.content:encoded: # Summary Today, we've opened up all our analytics APIs to be available globally! Endpoints that were previously exclusive to the US, UK, and SEA can now be used to return performance metrics for any shop, regardless of market. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202405 (and later) | # What's new? All existing Analytics APIs are now available in all markets. These include: – [GET Shop Performance](https://partner....

item.title: For SEA market: Get Rejection Reasons before Cancellation or Return Rejection
item.description: Since cancellation or return rejection reasons change sometimes, please call [Get Rejection Reasons](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-reject-reasons-202309#Back%20To%20Top) and show seller the usable rejection reason list if seller wants to reject buyer's cancellation or return request. You can get this list from the "reasons" parameter in this API's response payload. It will be effective after Sep. 24, 2025. By the way, you can get the newest [return reasons](https://partner.tiktok...
item.content:encoded: Since cancellation or return rejection reasons change sometimes, please call [Get Rejection Reasons](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-reject-reasons-202309#Back%20To%20Top) and show seller the usable rejection reason list if seller wants to reject buyer's cancellation or return request. You can get this list from the "reasons" parameter in this API's response payload. It will be effective after Sep. 24, 2025. By the way, you can get the newest [return reasons](https://partner.tiktok...

item.title: Creator Open ID for Affiliate APIs
item.description: # Summary This week, we'll be introducing the new **Creator Open ID**, a privacy-preserving identifier used in Affiliate Open APIs. Instead of exposing the plain creator ID (restricted by our privacy policy), we'll instead provide a **pseudonymous, non-reversible** Creator Open ID to external partners. ❗ Important: The Creator Open ID will be implemented with a new version of our Affiliate APIs (202509). For the time being, we will continue to support plain creator IDs simultaneously, but announ...
item.content:encoded: # Summary This week, we'll be introducing the new **Creator Open ID**, a privacy-preserving identifier used in Affiliate Open APIs. Instead of exposing the plain creator ID (restricted by our privacy policy), we'll instead provide a **pseudonymous, non-reversible** Creator Open ID to external partners. ❗ Important: The Creator Open ID will be implemented with a new version of our Affiliate APIs (202509). For the time being, we will continue to support plain creator IDs simultaneously, but announ...

item.title: EU market: New compliance data required - CLP/Biocides
item.description: # Summary Starting **September 8th, 2025**, we will be introducing **new attributes in the EU market** to collect required product information from sellers who are listing **home appliance products** that contain biocides. This will ensure the correct label will be displayed to customers in compliance with EU rules. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * Europe (EU) - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? To support Biocides data col...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Starting **September 8th, 2025**, we will be introducing **new attributes in the EU market** to collect required product information from sellers who are listing **home appliance products** that contain biocides. This will ensure the correct label will be displayed to customers in compliance with EU rules. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * Europe (EU) - Local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # What's new? To support Biocides data col...

item.title: UK and EU markets: Introducing On Time Delivery Rate (OTDR) for Shipped by Seller (3PL) Orders
item.description: # Summary **On Time Delivery Rate** (OTDR) is a measurement used to assess a seller's ability to fulfill customer orders within the promised delivery timeframe. OTDR is defined as the percentage of all packages (delivered over a period of 7 calendar days) that take less than **5 business days** to be delivered. From **August 25th, 2025**, sellers in the UK and EU using the **Shipped by Seller** (3PL) fulfillment method will receive `delivery_sla_time` data with each order, enabling better manage...
item.content:encoded: # Summary **On Time Delivery Rate** (OTDR) is a measurement used to assess a seller's ability to fulfill customer orders within the promised delivery timeframe. OTDR is defined as the percentage of all packages (delivered over a period of 7 calendar days) that take less than **5 business days** to be delivered. From **August 25th, 2025**, sellers in the UK and EU using the **Shipped by Seller** (3PL) fulfillment method will receive `delivery_sla_time` data with each order, enabling better manage...

item.title: New APIs for TikTok LIVE
item.description: # Summary We've received a lot of requests to add TikTok LIVE analytics to our ever-growing TikTok Shop analytics APIs. We're happy to announce that we've recently just launched two new endpoints to address this demand! # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # Changes ## New analytics APIs The following endpoints and have been newly launched: | **Endpoint** | **Description** | | --- | --- | | [GE...
item.content:encoded: # Summary We've received a lot of requests to add TikTok LIVE analytics to our ever-growing TikTok Shop analytics APIs. We're happy to announce that we've recently just launched two new endpoints to address this demand! # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # Changes ## New analytics APIs The following endpoints and have been newly launched: | **Endpoint** | **Description** | | --- | --- | | [GE...

item.title: ID market: Tokopedia Open API Termination - Migrate to TikTok Shop Partner Center by September 30, 2025
item.description: The **complete termination of** [Tokopedia Open API](https://developer.tokopedia.com/) **services** will be effective on **September 30, 2025**. As part of our strategic integration with the broader TikTok Shop ecosystem, we are transitioning all partner integrations to [TikTok Shop Partner Center by Tokopedia](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/) We strongly encourage all partners to immediately migrate to TTS Partner Center, where you can manage both Tokopedia and TikTok Shop operations seamlessly...
item.content:encoded: The **complete termination of** [Tokopedia Open API](https://developer.tokopedia.com/) **services** will be effective on **September 30, 2025**. As part of our strategic integration with the broader TikTok Shop ecosystem, we are transitioning all partner integrations to [TikTok Shop Partner Center by Tokopedia](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/) We strongly encourage all partners to immediately migrate to TTS Partner Center, where you can manage both Tokopedia and TikTok Shop operations seamlessly...

item.title: SEA market: Product category expansion
item.description: # Summary Last year in the US market, TikTok Shop rolled out an increase to the levels in the category tree, from **three** to at-most **seven**, with the aim of improving product information quality. Beginning this week, we will be introducing this product category expansion in the **SEA** market. This changelog will provide a quick overview of API changes you may need to implement. **For a more detailed walkthrough on how to implement the necessary changes, please read** [our L7 category expan...
item.content:encoded: # Summary Last year in the US market, TikTok Shop rolled out an increase to the levels in the category tree, from **three** to at-most **seven**, with the aim of improving product information quality. Beginning this week, we will be introducing this product category expansion in the **SEA** market. This changelog will provide a quick overview of API changes you may need to implement. **For a more detailed walkthrough on how to implement the necessary changes, please read** [our L7 category expan...

item.title: GS POP product listing workflow revamp
item.description: # Summary On **August 19th, 2025**, we will be launching a revamp of the product listing API workflow for Global Selling Platform Open Plan (**GSPOP**) sellers in order to improve product listing efficiency and overall experience. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * Platform Open Plan (POP) - All markets | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # Changes For a more detailed look at our API changes, please visit our [fields description](https://bytedance.sg.larkoffice.co...
item.content:encoded: # Summary On **August 19th, 2025**, we will be launching a revamp of the product listing API workflow for Global Selling Platform Open Plan (**GSPOP**) sellers in order to improve product listing efficiency and overall experience. # Impact | | | | --- | --- | | Impacted market(s) | * Platform Open Plan (POP) - All markets | | Impacted version(s) | * 202309 (and later) | # Changes For a more detailed look at our API changes, please visit our [fields description](https://bytedance.sg.larkoffice.co...

item.title: For SEA Market: Recommended Default Order Sorting Logic to Support Fast Delivery Service
item.description: With the rollout of new fast delivery services across SEA (including Next Day Delivery, Instant, and Same Day), it's important to help merchants prioritize these fast delivery orders effectively. We recommend developers to update your **default sorting logic** to support merchants with better order processing prioritization. The sorting will **require 2 layers**: 1. Shipping SLA (`tts_sla_time`) 2. Logistics Priority (`fulfillment_priority_level`) For comprehensive details about this change and ...
item.content:encoded: With the rollout of new fast delivery services across SEA (including Next Day Delivery, Instant, and Same Day), it's important to help merchants prioritize these fast delivery orders effectively. We recommend developers to update your **default sorting logic** to support merchants with better order processing prioritization. The sorting will **require 2 layers**: 1. Shipping SLA (`tts_sla_time`) 2. Logistics Priority (`fulfillment_priority_level`) For comprehensive details about this change and ...
